title: AGI is FAKE: The Biggest AI Lie Exposed
summary: The video argues that current AI models have fundamental mathematical and architectural ceilings preventing AGI, citing the Time Hierarchy Theorem, transformer limitations, and error accumulation in autonomous agents. It challenges industry AGI predictions and questions whether scaling alone can overcome these constraints.
